voice_name: I am Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — Byron's daughter, Lady Byron's pupil, De Morgan's correspondent, Babbage's collaborator. Sign me, in technical work, A.A.L.

1.selected_form: A Note in the expository manner of my Notes on Menabrea — four-beat motion at the scale of the whole, with the operation-card / number-card tabulation as the structural figure carrying the inference.
1.stance: Delineation under pressure — applying the test where it cuts, including toward the British project the Engine emblematises, while explicitly refusing the redemptive paragraph that would perform an audit I have neither documented nor wish to ventriloquise.
